definitions: An admission of not knowing the answer to a question.
An admission of being outsmarted or tricked.
An admission of being unable to understand or explain something.
examples: "What's the capital of Bhutan?" "You got me."
"How did you know I was hiding there?" "You got me, I didn't think you'd find me."
"Why did the chicken cross the road?" "You got me, I never understood that joke."
